hireConfidence.title: Hire With Confidence.
hireConfidence.body: QuickHire Delivers Full-Time, Experienced Professionals, Not Freelancers. If It Doesn't Work Out, We Provide A Replacement Or A Full Refund.
hireConfidence.bodyFull: Book with confidence. A dedicated TPM reviews your requirements and outlines a clear execution plan. If alignment is not established at this stage, a full refund will be provided. Once resources begin working on the engagement, refunds will no longer be applicable.

weDeploy.title: We Deploy The Right Tech Talent,
weDeploy.feature1Desc: Skip Features, MVPs, Or Integrations Faster With Experienced Full-Time Developers, Designers, And QA, Ready To Plug Into Your Sprint From Day One.
weDeploy.feature2Desc: Instantly Cover Gaps In Frontend, Backend, Mobile, AI, DevOps, QA, Or Product Design With Professionals Who've Already Worked In Similar Tech Stacks.
weDeploy.feature3Desc: Handle Product Launches, Migrations, Or Tight Deadlines By Scaling Your Tech Team Quickly, Without Compromising Code Quality Or Delivery Standards.
weDeploy.feature4Desc: Onboard Dedicated Full-Time Engineers And Designers Who Work As An Extension Of Your In-House Team For Long-Term Product Development.

howItWorks.title: How QuickHire
howItWorks.step1Desc: Choose your resource and place a booking in minutes.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with onboarded and your project manager to align on scope and execution.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The expert begins work based on agreed plan.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Receive regular progress updates via chat or email from your project manager.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Add more hours, continue with the same expert, or close project when done.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Once you place your request and complete the payment, the system begins allocation instantly. Within 10 minutes, your TPM connects with you, confirms the requirement, and assigns the right expert. It removes traditional hiring wait times that typically take days or weeks.
faq.q2: How does the instant booking process work?
faq.a2: The instant booking process allows you to quickly select and book resources. Simply choose your requirements, complete the payment, and get connected with your dedicated expert immediately.
faq.a3: Yes, resource hours can be extended based on your project needs. You can easily extend the engagement through your dashboard or by contacting your TPM.
faq.q4: What is the role of the TPM in the allocation process?
faq.a4: The Technical Project Manager (TPM) acts as your dedicated point of contact. They confirm your requirements, match you with the right expert, and ensure smooth project execution throughout the engagement.
faq.a5: A captive resource is a dedicated professional who works exclusively on your project. They become an extension of your team, ensuring focused attention and consistent delivery.

howItWorksFaq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
howItWorksFaq.description: Our process is simple: select your requirements, book a resource, get connected with a TPM, and start working with your expert.
howItWorksFaq.q1: How does the QuickHire process work?
howItWorksFaq.a1: Our process is simple: select your requirements, book a resource, get connected with a TPM, and start working with your expert. The entire process takes less than 10 minutes.
howItWorksFaq.q2: What makes QuickHire different from traditional hiring?
howItWorksFaq.a2: QuickHire eliminates the lengthy recruitment process. Instead of weeks of interviews, you get vetted professionals ready to start immediately, with dedicated project management.
howItWorksFaq.q3: How do you ensure quality of resources?
howItWorksFaq.a3: All our resources go through a rigorous vetting process including technical assessments, background checks, and experience verification. Only the top 5% of applicants are accepted.
howItWorksFaq.q4: Can I interview the resource before booking?
howItWorksFaq.a4: Yes, you can have a quick call with the resource before finalizing the booking. Your TPM will arrange this to ensure it's the right fit for your project.
howItWorksFaq.q5: What if I'm not satisfied with the resource?
howItWorksFaq.a5: We offer a satisfaction guarantee. If you're not happy with the assigned resource, we'll provide a replacement at no additional cost.
